name: translategemma-1b-nativekd2-q4k-rdna3-throughput-probe
description: Experimental TranslateGemma 1B NativeKD2 EN/ES calibration profile for AMD RDNA3/Vulkan evidence. Preserves the manifest 4x1 sequential decode cadence while retaining Q4K materialization, selecting wide-tile Q4K prefill, and enabling exact-safe packed-QKV and RMSNorm-pair fusions.
